title: Green Thumbz Terracotta Plant Pots - 20cm x 2 Pack Large Terracotta Pots with Saucer and Drainage Hole - Flower Pots Outdoor or Indoor Use - Brown Clay Pot with Tray
features: 🌻【 Clay Pots for Plants 】 Terracotta plant pots are made from clay, a raw material that provides a rustic and earthy aesthetic to your garden or indoor space. Terracotta plant pot are porous, allowing for good airflow to the plant roots. This helps prevent waterlogging and promotes healthy root development by allowing excess moisture to evaporate.

🌱【 Versatility 】Measuring 20cm, these clay flower pots comes in a pack of 2. These clay pot includes terracotta saucer and drainage holes in order to keep your soil ventilated making them ideal for indoor or outdoor use. Terracotta pot are suitable for a wide range of plants, from flowers to herbs to small shrubs. Their neutral color also complements various plant types and styles of gardens.

🍀【 Insulation 】 Large terracotta plant pots provides insulation to plant roots, helping to regulate soil temperature. This is particularly beneficial in climates with fluctuating temperatures as it protects roots from extremes of heat or cold.
🍃【 Durability】 Clay plant pots are known for their durability, especially when properly cared for. They can withstand harsh weather conditions and last for many years.
🌟【 Warranty 】 Here at Green Thumbz we are committed to giving 100% warranty on all items. If there is an issue with our terracotta pots for garden, feel free to message us!
